problem: What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography
mechanism: DNA computing for massively parallel search
hypothesis: DNA computing for massively parallel search may resolve What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Hardware prototype with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
